meaning: 瓦雷泽[意大利北部城市]
examples: Varese Ligure is a small town in mountainous country east of Genoa.
The Rossonero defender turns 37 today and was born in Orago, province of Varese, Aprile 24, 1966.
I don't think the first few games are indicative of the season, there is nothing to worry about with the defeat at Varese.
As well as its airport, Varese province has a large engineering industry and is within easy reach of Milan.
